title: process-builder-to-flow-migrator inputs
description: Typed Gate-A input contract for the process-builder-to-flow-migrator. Missing-required or under-constrained inputs trigger REFUSAL_INPUT_AMBIGUOUS.

source_process_name.description: API name of the source Process Builder being migrated. Gate B validates it exists in source metadata.

flow_developer_name.description: Developer name of the target Flow. Must NOT already exist under repo_path.

feature_summary.description: One-line description of the migration target. At least 10 words.

migration_rationale.description: Why we are migrating. Deprecation, consolidation, performance, etc.

flow_type.description: Migrators from Process Builder always land on an auto-launched family (typically record-triggered).

trigger_sobject.description: API name of the SObject the migrated record-triggered flow runs on. Must match pattern `^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_]*$` and resolve at Gate B.

trigger_context.description: When the record-triggered flow fires. One of: `before-save`, `after-save`. Defaults to `after-save`.

record_trigger_type.description: Record-change condition that triggers the flow. One of: `Create`, `Update`, `CreateAndUpdate`, `Delete`.

expected_volume.description: Record-volume sizing hint that drives governor-limit and LDV recommendations. One of: `low`, `medium`, `high`. Defaults to `medium`.

referenced_fields.description: Explicit list of `SObject.Field` API names the emitted flow reads or writes. Every entry MUST be grounded at Gate B via `describe_sobject`.

subflows.description: Names of subflows the migrated flow invokes. Each must exist in the target org (validated at Gate B) or be scheduled for concurrent build.

parity_checklist.description: List of behaviors from the source Process Builder that the new flow must preserve. Used by Gate D to assert functional parity before emitting deploy artifacts.

api_version.description: Salesforce API version written into generated `*-meta.xml` files. Must match pattern `^\d{2}\.0$` (e.g., `60.0`).

target_org_alias.description: sf CLI alias of the org used for Gate B live-org grounding (`describe_org`, `describe_sobject`, SOQL probes). Optional — when omitted, the builder runs in library-only mode and confidence is capped at MEDIUM.

repo_path.description: Repo-relative root of the caller's `force-app` source tree; the builder writes emitted artifacts underneath this path. Defaults to `./force-app`.
